subject: Weekly Team Sync - Thursday 10am
body:
Hi,

Just a reminder about our weekly team sync this Thursday at 10am in Conference Room B.

Please come prepared with your project updates.

Thanks,
Alex

subject: Updated Company Policy Document Available
body:
Dear Employee,

The updated company policy handbook for 2026 is now available on the internal portal.

Please review the changes at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,
HR Department
